'''Warrl Surprise''' was a beverage on the market during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Food-stub}}

==History==
This sweet drink was prized by the [[Myyydril]] people. It was made by leaves of the [[Warrl]] plant, only native to the [[Myyydril Caverns/Legends|Myyydril Caverns]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''
